commands.title: Generate krb5.conf
commands.description: Kerberos configuration for realm and KDC settings (realm = uppercase domain).

commands.title: Get TGT with password (impacket-getTGT)
commands.description: Request a TGT using username and password, save to a Kerberos ccache file.

commands.title: Get TGT with NTLM hash (impacket-getTGT)
commands.description: Request a TGT using username and NTLM hash without password.
